languageGate.title: App language does not match this project
languageGate.body: This project is locked to {{language}}. Business questions and AI output stay in that language. Switch your app language to {{language}} in Settings, then return here.

modules.title: Choose modules
modules.subtitle: Select the modules your ERP should include.
modules.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one module.
modules.inventory.label: Inventory
modules.inventory.desc: Track products, stock levels, purchases, and shipments
modules.invoice.label: Invoice
modules.invoice.desc: Create invoices, record payments, issue credit notes
modules.hr.label: HR
modules.hr.desc: Manage employees, leave, attendance, and payroll prep

questions.title: Module questions
questions.subtitle: Answer these to tailor the modules to your business.

description.title: Describe your business
description.subtitle: The more detail you provide, the more accurate your ERP will be.
description.placeholder: Tell us about your business, products, customers, and processes...

clarify.title: A few clarifications
clarify.subtitle: Help the AI get your business right.

download.title: Download your ERP
download.subtitle: Download the full source code as a zip.

language.lockedNote: Locked to the language chosen at creation.

what_business.question: What does your business do?
what_business.placeholder: e.g. "We sell clothing in two small shops" or "We run a bakery with home delivery"

products_services.question: What products or services do you offer?
products_services.placeholder: e.g. "T-shirts, jeans, and accessories" or "Cakes, bread, pastries"

user_count.question: How many people will use this system?

main_problem.question: What is the main problem you want this system to solve?
main_problem.placeholder: e.g. "I lose track of what I have in stock" or "Creating invoices takes too long"

special_rules.question: Are there any special rules for how things work in your business?
special_rules.placeholder: e.g. "My manager must approve big orders" or "We give discounts to regular customers"
special_rules.hint: Think about any approval steps, discount rules, or special processes you follow.

anything_else.question: Anything else you'd like us to know?
anything_else.placeholder: Optional — anything that might help us build the right system for you

businessSection.title: 3. Tell Us About Your Business
businessSection.subtitle: Answer a few simple questions so we can build the right system for you.

skipWarning.title: Some questions were skipped
skipWarning.body1: Skipping too many questions may result in a less accurate ERP. The more we know about your business, the better we can customize your system.
skipWarning.body2: If you need help answering, try our chatbot assistant — it's pulsing on the bottom-right of your screen right now.

extractTip.mac: Double-click the .zip file in Finder to extract it.
extractTip.windows: Right-click the .zip file and choose "Extract All..."
extractTip.linux: Run: unzip your-erp.zip  (or use your file manager)

whatYouCanDo.title: What You Can Do
whatYouCanDo.item4Rest: like Receive and Issue (if inventory is enabled)

askAi.title: Ask AI to Make Changes
askAi.subtitle: Describe what you want to add, remove, or change and the AI will update your setup.

jsonEditor.title: Advanced: Edit JSON Directly
jsonEditor.hint: Edit the raw JSON configuration. For advanced users only.

download.title: 5. Download & Run Your ERP
download.subtitle: Your ERP is ready. Download it, extract the ZIP, and double-click to start.
download.noExtras: No extra software, no internet connection, and no technical knowledge required.
download.selfContained: Self-contained bundle · includes everything needed to run
download.packaging: Packaging your ERP with all dependencies. This may take a minute or two...
download.differentOs: Download for a different operating system
download.runtimeStatusDesc: Tracks startup and health for your generated ERP app.
download.startThenCheck: Start your ERP app, then click "Check health".
download.urlInvalid: Health URL must be a valid absolute URL (example: http://localhost:3000/health).
download.payloadUnrecognized: Health endpoint responded, but payload is not recognized.
download.timeout: Health check timed out after 5 seconds.
download.unreachable: Browser could not reach the health URL. If platform and ERP run on different hosts, localhost checks may be blocked.
download.dockerDesc: This downloads a Docker-based version that requires Docker Desktop. Only for developers or IT professionals.
download.whatIsBody: It is a complete, self-contained application that runs entirely on your computer. It includes its own server, database, and interface. No internet connection is needed after downloading.

postDownload.title: How to start your ERP
postDownload.step1Title: Find and extract the downloaded ZIP file
postDownload.step2Title: Open the extracted folder and double-click
postDownload.macOsTip: If macOS shows a security warning, right-click the file and choose "Open" instead.
postDownload.windowsTip: If Windows shows a SmartScreen warning, click "More info" then "Run anyway".
postDownload.linuxTip: You may need to run: chmod +x start.sh first, then ./start.sh
postDownload.linuxSupported: Any glibc-based x86_64 distribution -- Ubuntu, Debian, Fedora, Arch, Manjaro, openSUSE, Mint, Pop!_OS.
postDownload.linuxUnsupported: Alpine / musl, ARM64 (Raspberry Pi, Apple Silicon Linux), 32-bit, NixOS (without nix-ld).
postDownload.step3Title: Your browser will open automatically at
postDownload.step3Desc: That is your ERP. You can start adding data right away.
postDownload.dataBody1: Everything is stored locally on your computer in the
postDownload.dataBody2: folder. To back up, simply copy that folder to a safe location. No cloud account needed.

entityDetails.title: What You Will See in Your ERP

review.title: 5. Review & Approval
review.subtitle: Check schema, modules, and relationships before final approval.
review.warningsPresent_one: {{count}} warning is still present in this SDF. Review it before approval.
review.warningsPresent_other: {{count}} warnings are still present in this SDF. Review them before approval.
review.warningsPresent: {{count}} warnings are still present in this SDF. Review them before approval.
review.revisionPlaceholder: Describe what should be changed before approval...

accessRequirements.title: 4. Access Groups & Permissions
accessRequirements.subtitle: Define who will use this ERP and what each group should be allowed to do.
accessRequirements.atLeastOne: At least one group with a group name is required to generate your ERP.
accessRequirements.groupNamePlaceholder: e.g. Warehouse Team, Finance, HR Managers
accessRequirements.responsibilitiesPlaceholder: e.g. Receive stock, manage products, adjust inventory counts

prefilledConfig.title: Your ERP Configuration
prefilledConfig.subtitle: Auto-generated from your answers above. This is sent as a starting point for AI.

clarificationQuestions.title: Follow-up Questions
clarificationQuestions.subtitle: The AI needs a bit more information to finalize your setup.

postGeneration.readyBody: Preview your ERP live, test it out, and request any changes you need.

generationModal.needMoreInfoTitle: We need a bit more information
generationModal.needMoreInfoBody: Please answer these questions so we can build the right ERP for you.

stepDetails.starting: Your answers are being saved before generation starts.
stepDetails.distributor: We are interpreting your business description and module choices.
stepDetails.clarifications: We need your answers to a few questions before we can continue.
stepDetails.generators: AI is building configuration for each selected ERP module.
stepDetails.integrator: Module outputs are being combined into one coherent ERP definition.
stepDetails.finalizing: Checking whether any follow-up questions are still needed.
stepDetails.normalizing: Validating structure and applying final normalization.
stepDetails.validating: Running schema validation on the generated definition.

moduleSelector.title: 1. Choose Modules
moduleSelector.subtitle: Select which parts of the ERP you need. You can always change this later.

defaultQuestions.title: 2. Answer Questions
defaultQuestions.subtitle: These answers directly configure your ERP. Answer all to continue.

header.subtitle: Set up your ERP step by step

history.generated: Generated a new SDF from build mode inputs.
history.clarified: Applied clarification answers to the current SDF.
history.manualSave: Saved manual JSON edits to the SDF.
history.aiRevision: Applied AI edit instructions from SDF preview.
history.approved: Approved current SDF for ERP generation.
history.rejected: Rejected current SDF and moved project back to Draft.
history.aiRevisionFromReview: Applied AI revision requested from review panel.
history.loadedBaseline: Loaded latest saved SDF from project history.

errors.loadDefaultQuestions: Failed to load default module questions
errors.answerRequired: Please answer all required questions before generating.
errors.genTimeout: Generation timed out. Your inputs are saved — please try again.
errors.genSlow: Generation is taking longer than expected. Your inputs are saved — please try again in a few minutes.
errors.genNetwork: Our AI service is temporarily unreachable. We're working on it — please try again in a few minutes.
errors.genServer: Our AI service encountered an issue. We're working on it — please try again in a few minutes.
errors.genGeneric: Something went wrong during generation. Please try again.

answerReview.titleAcknowledge: A few features aren't supported yet
answerReview.subtitleBlocking: Our reviewer found issues that would lead to a poor generation. Please address them and try again.
answerReview.subtitleAcknowledge: You can still proceed — anything you acknowledge below will be logged as a feature request and skipped for now.
answerReview.acknowledgeFeature: Log "{{feature}}" as a feature request and continue without it
